Title: Picking balloons in the NPC form
Summary: The NPC CasualRemarks editor autocompletes from the catalog of balloons.
Body:
## The picker

In the NPC edit form, the CasualRemarks editor is an array of balloon refs. Each entry is a string in `<model>/<basename>` form. Typing into a row shows a dropdown of every balloon in the catalog, with the balloon's Text as the option label so you can pick by content rather than memorizing basenames.

## How writeback handles the array

When you save the NPC, the writer:

1. Pre resolves the UID for every unique balloon ref in the array (one read per balloon's `.tres` to get its uid).
2. Emits the new plural `CasualRemarks = Array[Object]([ExtResource("..."), ...])` line in the `.tres`.
3. Removes any legacy singular `CasualRemark = ExtResource(...)` line if present, migrating older files automatically.

## Reverse lookup

Each balloon's edit page carries a "Used by" panel listing every NPC that references it. Useful for "I want to retire this balloon, who would notice?"
